scope.target: Define canonical source schema and create canonical root structure
constraints: Do not migrate all existing assets yet
Establish canonical structure before wrapper changes

inputs.architecture_target: Create a neutral canonical source layout and schema that can feed multiple agent wrappers
user_constraints: Proceed stage by stage with commits

steps: Created canonical asset templates for skills, commands, and prompt packages
Documented the schema decision in the workflow
validation: Canonical root exists and is distinct from wrapper directories
Templates cover the taxonomy fields from Stage 1
No existing wrapper directories were broken by the schema setup
deferred_items: Define wrapper mapping for each supported agent
Migrate pilot assets into canonical structure

results.summary: Completed Stage 2 canonical schema design and created the initial .ai/assets structure.

historical_note: This task preserves the original schema-design stage context. Subsequent stages refined the taxonomy by keeping top-level skills separate from delegated sub-agent-role prompts and by removing the active legacy command layer.
